completion.summary: Verified that summary field is properly typed and returned in queries. Added integration tests to confirm findings with optional summary field are stored in findingsJson and returned by getLatestFindings query. All acceptance criteria verified: AC-1 (summaries persisted), AC-2 (query returns summary), AC-3 (backward compatible), AC-4 (graceful handling). No schema changes needed - using existing findingsJson field.

acceptance_criteria.description: Report with summaries → Report saved to database → Summaries persisted in findingsJson
acceptance_criteria.evidence: convex/whatsNew.ts:124 accepts summary field, convex/schema.ts:322 has findingsJson field

acceptance_criteria.description: Query latest findings → Client requests findings → Response includes summary field
acceptance_criteria.evidence: convex/whatsNew/queries.ts:196 has Finding type with summary?: string

acceptance_criteria.description: Old report without summaries → Client requests findings → Findings return without summary (no error)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: summary field is optional (?: string), query handles missing data gracefully

acceptance_criteria.description: Finding without summary → Card renders → Card shows title only (no broken UI)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Optional summary field allows components to handle undefined gracefully
